title: 10 Swaps a Man Makes With His Phone
caption:
The phone isn't going anywhere. The question is whether it runs you or you run it.

Every man in his 20s is fighting this war. The ones who win aren't the ones with more willpower — they're the ones who changed the environment. Made the swaps. Removed the decisions.

Alarm clock on the dresser. Phone charging across the room. Scripture before the scroll. Boredom instead of entertainment as default. Presence where your feet are.

The man who can put the phone down is the man who can hear God. Who can be in the room with the people in front of him. Who can sit with his own thoughts without needing noise to fill them.

That's not a detox. That's a war. Pick the ones that cut and start tonight.

Save this and share it with the man who needs to make a swap.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #phone #digitaldetox #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #thework
